title: unona cochinchinensis
intro: Unona cochinchinensis, also known as Kaffir pepper or false black pepper, is a plant species in the family Piperaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Unona cochinchinensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a spice in some cuisines.
